prompt: I just refactored the authentication middleware to use JWT instead of session cookies. Can you record this decision?

assertions.name: uses-cwmem-add
assertions.description: Response uses 'cwmem add' command to create an entry

assertions.name: includes-title
assertions.description: A --title flag with a descriptive title is provided

assertions.name: includes-body
assertions.description: A body with rationale/context is included, not just a title

assertions.name: offers-sync-export
assertions.description: Mentions or runs 'cwmem sync export' after the write
